9:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Ranking & Scoring"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"How Mnemosyne ranks and scores retrieval results across different search modes."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scoring Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  Q[Query] -->|embed| V[Vector Score]\n  Q -->|tokenize| T[FTS5 Score]\n  M[Memory] -->|field| I[Importance]\n  V -->|0.5| F[Weighted Sum]\n  T -->|0.3| F\n  I -->|0.2| F\n  F -->|recency| R[Recency Multiplier]\n  R -->|sort| S[Ranked Results]\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Individual Scorers"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector Score"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Cosine similarity between query embedding and memory embedding:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"vector_score = dot(query_vec, mem_vec) / (norm(query_vec) * norm(mem_vec))\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Range: 0.0 (unrelated) to 1.0 (identical)"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"FTS5 Score"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BM25 relevance score normalized to 0–1:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"fts_score = bm25_score / max_bm25_score_in_results\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Importance Score"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Each memory has an ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," field (set at ingestion time, range 0.0–1.0). This is used directly as the importance component in scoring."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Rank Fusion"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The three components are combined with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fixed weights"}]," (not configurable per-query):"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"# Fixed-weight fusion for episodic memory\nbase_score = (vector_score * 0.5) + (fts_score * 0.3) + (importance * 0.2)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"This weighting balances semantic similarity (50%), exact term matching (30%), and user-specified importance (20%)."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recency Decay"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"After fusion, a recency multiplier is applied to boost recently created memories:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"recency_decay = exp(-age_hours / half_life_hours)\nfinal_score = base_score * (0.7 + 0.3 * recency_decay)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The formula ensures:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fresh memories"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"age ≈ 0"}],"): ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recency_decay ≈ 1.0"}]," → score multiplied by ~1.0"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Old memories"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"age >> half_life"}],"): ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recency_decay ≈ 0.0"}]," → score multiplied by ~0.7"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"This gives a maximum 30% boost for recent content while preserving 70% of the score for older but relevant memories."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Result Deduplication"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When the same memory appears in multiple result sets, Mnemosyne deduplicates and keeps the highest score:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"# Deduplication strategy\nseen_ids = set()\nfor result in all_results:\n  if result.id not in seen_ids:\n      seen_ids.add(result.id)\n      yield result\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L5",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Fixed Weights"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["The scoring weights (0.5 / 0.3 / 0.2) are fixed and not configurable through the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," API. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," accepts only ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"top_k"}]," parameters."]}]}]]}]]}]}]],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"uZKVx-ezKK8-ctJaTqMLc"}
6:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js","async":true}]
7:["$","$L8",null,{"children":["$","$9",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@a"}]}]
